programme.title: Star Wars: Episode IV -- A New Hope
programme.desc: The Imperial Forces -- under orders from cruel Darth Vader (David Prowse) -- hold Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) hostage, in their efforts to quell the rebellion against the Galactic Empire. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) and Han Solo (Harrison Ford), captain of the Millennium Falcon, work together with the companionable droid duo R2-D2 (Kenny Baker) and C-3PO (Anthony Daniels) to rescue the beautiful princess, help the Rebel Alliance, and restore freedom and justice to the Galaxy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Chee pays Manuelito a visit after discovering a link between their cases; Leaphorn pursues a fugitive suspect; Special Agent Washington interviews an eyewitness to the crime she's investigating.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Egyptian God of Chaos inhabits a human, and tries to release pure evil into the world; the librarians must decipher clues in a science museum.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn leads the others on a rescue mission, which leads them into a subterranean trap filled with ancient Egyptian werewolves.

programme.sub-title: What Are Little Girls Made Of?
programme.desc: The Enterprise finds Nurse Chapel's former fiancé, a scientist missing for five years; guest Ted Cassidy.

programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a band of orphaned children living alone on a desolate, Earthlike world; guests Kim Darby, Michael J. Pollard.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the Tollans suddenly decide to share weapons technology with SG-1, O'Neill tries to find out why.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An encounter with a benign alien species leads SG-1 into contact with yet another race that just seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a contestant on a popular dance competition show leads Castle and Beckett to a shocking secret that may have led to her death.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a bomb kills five people at a protest rally, Beckett and Castle try to solve the case by reconstructing the 47 seconds prior to the explosion.

programme.title: Star Wars: Episode III -- Revenge of the Sith
programme.desc: It has been three years since the Clone Wars began. Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi (Ewan McGregor) and Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker (Hayden Christensen) rescue Chancellor Palpatine (Ian McDiarmid) from General Grievous, the commander of the droid armies, but Grievous escapes. Suspicions are raised within the Jedi Council concerning Chancellor Palpatine, with whom Anakin has formed a bond. Asked to spy on the chancellor, and full of bitterness toward the Jedi Council, Anakin embraces the Dark Side.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: A routine artifact retrieval becomes complicated when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra; a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel.
